description: Deal Backend Tenant Isolation & Audit Logging. (1) CRITICAL: PrismaOpportunityRepository.findById() (line 82) has NO tenantId WHERE clause — cross-tenant read/write/delete possible via getById/update/delete/moveStage/dealForecast (B-01). Fix: add tenantId to findById() and findByOwnerId() WHERE clauses. (2) CRITICAL: Zero auditLogger.log() calls across all 16 opportunity + pipeline-config procedures (B-02). Add audit logging to create/update/delete/moveStage (especially CLOSED_WON/CLOSED_LOST) and pipeline config changes. (3) Create notification in create procedure uses raw ctx.prisma instead of prismaWithTenant (B-03). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 5-6.

wiring_complete.target: Zero cross-tenant data leaks; audit entries for all 16 procedures

validations.name: Task completion verification
validations.notes: Task marked as completed in Sprint_plan.csv

notes: Deal/opportunity domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md.
